mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BIOMETRIC_SESSION (SESSION_ID, DEVICE_ID, USER_ID, CHALLENGE_HEX, CLIENT_NONCE, REQ_TIMESTAMP, EXPIRE_AT, USED_YN, CREATED_AT) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{deviceId}, #{userId}, #{serverChallengeHex}, #{clientNonce}, #{timestamp}, #{expireAt, typeHandler=com.biometric.poc.mapper.handler.InstantTypeHandler}, #{used, typeHandler=com.biometric.poc.mapper.handler.BooleanYnTypeHandler}, #{createdAt, typeHandler=com.biometric.poc.mapper.handler.InstantTypeHandler})
mapper.select: SELECT SESSION_ID, DEVICE_ID, USER_ID, CHALLENGE_HEX, CLIENT_NONCE, REQ_TIMESTAMP, EXPIRE_AT, USED_YN, CREATED_AT FROM BIOMETRIC_SESSION WHERE SESSION_ID = #{sessionId}
